---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Intune App Factory
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Application

Application name:

```text
Example: GoogleChrome
```
## Environment?
 Build
 Test
 Publish
 WinGet Update
 Other

## What Happened?
Describe the issue.

## Error Message
Paste error message here

## App Definition (attach)
- app.json
- test-detection.ps1 (if applicable)

## Installer Type
MSI or EXE?

## Application available in WinGet?
- Yes or No
- If yes, provide packageID (What you would put in json field `WinGetPacakageId`)
- If no, provide direct download URL (vendor or sharepoint)

## Installation Details
- For EXE installers --> Install command (if different than default) & uninstall command
- For MSI installers --> install arguments

## Assignment Group
Desired assignment group in Intune for the app
